name: cliproxyapi-dashboard
description: CLIProxyAPI Dashboard is a Next.js 16 web UI for managing CLIProxyAPIPlus, which wraps OAuth-based CLI tools like Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex as OpenAI-compatible APIs. It helps manage providers, API keys, configs, logs, and updates without editing YAML files. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.
